title: Chinas Major Dry Bulk Imports Collectively Up 25 Y O Y In June
section_path: Chinas Major Dry Bulk Imports Collectively Up 25 Y O Y In June
section_path_text: Chinas Major Dry Bulk Imports Collectively Up 25 Y O Y In June
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we have continued to stress in our Weekly Dry Bulk Reports and Weekly China Reports, China's dry bulk commodity imports have remained strong as we have been anticipating despite the unevenness in China's industrial recovery. China's import data for June has now been released and shows that China's coal, iron ore, and soybean imports totaled a very robust 145.7 million tons. This is down month-on-month by just 2 million tons (-1%) and is up year-on-year by 29.5 million tons (25%).
